predictions.fixed: on a NEWCOMER probe, bayesBits(early) ≈ bayesBits(late) — flat (the gap)
predictions.signal: on a NEWCOMER probe, bayesBits(early) > bayesBits(late) by a clear margin (the fix)
predictions.direction: a reader fresh off a burst of newcomers is LESS surprised by another newcomer

controls.surface: distinct-figure count, raw-newcomer count, and total γ-mass are matched across early/late; a surface method is flat — only γ-decayed recency dissociates
controls.mechanistic: the signal-vs-fixed change on a RETURNING probe ≪ on a NEWCOMER probe

omnimodal: the newcomer dissociation direction replicates in BOTH senses (stream, music) through one shared reader; no per-sense code
mechanism: reserve = Σ_newcomers γ^(at-1-firstSeen) — the γ-decayed novelty rate as an amplitude through the unchanged Born step (surpriseAt/forwardDist)
